name: Mojito
instruction: 1. Muddle mint leaves with simple syrup and lime juice. 2. Add rum and top with soda water. 3. Garnish with a mint sprig.

name: Margarita
instruction: 1. Rub the rim of the glass with lime and dip in salt. 2. Shake tequila, triple sec, and lime juice with ice. 3. Strain into the glass.

name: Martini
instruction: 1. Pour gin and dry vermouth into a mixing glass with ice cubes. 2. Stir well. 3. Strain into a chilled martini cocktail glass.

name: Old Fashioned
description: A robust and balanced whiskey cocktail.
instruction: 1. Stir sugar syrup with bitters. 2. Add bourbon and ice. 3. Stir well and garnish with an orange twist.

name: Piña Colada
description: A sweet cocktail made with rum, coconut cream, and pineapple juice.
instruction: 1. Blend all ingredients with ice until smooth. 2. Pour into a chilled glass. 3. Garnish with a pineapple wedge.

name: Cosmopolitan
description: A tart and slightly sweet vodka cocktail.
instruction: 1. Shake all ingredients with ice. 2. Strain into a cocktail glass. 3. Garnish with a lime wheel.

name: Negroni
description: A popular Italian cocktail, perfectly balanced and bitter.
instruction: 1. Pour all ingredients directly into an old-fashioned glass filled with ice. 2. Stir gently. 3. Garnish with half an orange slice.

name: Whiskey Sour
description: A classic balance of sweet and sour.
instruction: 1. Shake bourbon, lemon juice, and simple syrup with ice. 2. Strain into a rocks glass. 3. Garnish with a cherry.

name: Daiquiri
instruction: 1. Shake all ingredients well with ice. 2. Double strain into a chilled coupe glass.

name: Mai Tai
instruction: 1. Shake all ingredients except dark rum with ice. 2. Strain into a glass with crushed ice. 3. Float dark rum on top.

name: Cuba Libre
description: More than just a Rum and Coke, thanks to fresh lime.
instruction: 1. Fill a highball glass with ice. 2. Add rum and squeeze lime juice. 3. Top with cola and stir lightly.

name: Moscow Mule
description: A spicy and refreshing vodka drink served in a copper mug.
instruction: 1. Combine vodka and ginger beer in a copper mug or highball glass filled with ice. 2. Add lime juice. 3. Stir gently.

name: Gin and Tonic
instruction: 1. Fill a glass with ice. 2. Pour in gin. 3. Top with tonic water and garnish with a lime slice.

name: Tequila Sunrise
description: A visually stunning drink that looks like a sunrise.
instruction: 1. Pour tequila and orange juice into a glass over ice. 2. Add grenadine, which will sink to the bottom. 3. Do not stir.

name: Espresso Martini
instruction: 1. Shake all ingredients vigorously with ice to create a nice froth. 2. Strain into a chilled martini glass.
